; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC: ; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC format.
Add Device and Enable Live Polling: Add Device and Enable Live Polling
Add this many seconds of overlap to avoi: Adiciona estes segundos de sobreposicao para evitar lacunas nos limites das paginas.
Apply this history window to every selec: Apply this history window to every selected Fleet Trend chart.
BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro a: BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro app families all expose lead-acid and lithium setup paths. Lead-acid supports regular, AGM, EFB, GEL, and custom. Lithium supports lithium and custom. Custom profiles can use the intelligent algorithm or a voltage-to-SoC curve. The gateway now generates the device ID automatically and assigns the visual badges from the battery and vehicle metadata you choose below.
BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical: Ordem de estados do protocolo BM200/BM6: Critico, Baixo, Normal, Carregando, Flutuacao. Estado atual: Normal.
Enable periodic onboard history import: Ativar importacao periodica do historico interno
Imports dense supported-device history p: Importa periodicamente o historico denso de dispositivos suportados e apos longos periodos offline.
Enable BM300 Pro/BM7 history import: Ativar importacao do historico BM300 Pro/BM7
Keep BM300 Pro/BM7 archive imports separ: Mantem as importacoes de arquivo BM300 Pro/BM7 com ativacao separada.
Caps each automatic or manual BM300 Pro/: Limita cada sincronizacao automatica ou manual do historico BM300 Pro/BM7. O maximo configurado se baseia na janela observada de 883 registros e na retencao anunciada de 72 dias.
Battery charge is low and should be rech: A carga da bateria esta baixa e deve ser recarregada em breve.
Battery condition is stable and ready fo: A condicao da bateria esta estavel e pronta para uso normal.
Battery is full and is being maintained: A bateria esta cheia e mantida em carga de flutuacao.
Battery is in a critically low or alarm: A bateria esta em condicao critica ou de alarme.
Caps each automatic or manual BM200/BM6: Limita cada sincronizacao automatica ou manual do historico BM200/BM6. Uma pagina cobre cerca de 8 horas e 32 minutos.
Choose how many batteries can appear on: Choose how many batteries can appear on one overview image.
Choose how many monitored batteries stay: Choose how many monitored batteries stay visible before the overview pages horizontally on larger fleets.
Choose live to read real devices over Bl: Choose live to read real devices over Bluetooth, or fake for offline UI testing.
Choose the language used by the local we: Choose the language used by the local web interface.
Choose the light or dark visual style fo: Choose the light or dark visual style for generated frame images.
Choose which chart images the frame expo: Choose which chart images the frame export should generate.
Choose which network interface the web s: Choose which network interface the web server listens on, for example 0.0.0.0 or 127.0.0.1.
Choose which retained time window charts: Choose which retained time window charts should open with by default.
Controls how long the gateway searches f: Controls how long the gateway searches for each Bluetooth device before giving up.
Controls how long the gateway waits for: Controls how long the gateway waits for a Bluetooth connection to complete.
Device added. First poll already running: Dispositivo adicionado. A primeira consulta já está em execução.
Disabled until the BM7 history decoder i: Desativado ate que o decodificador de historico BM7 seja implementado
Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed b: Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed by the official app, including custom curves. Battery and vehicle badges are assigned automatically.
Enable periodic BM200 history import: Ativar importacao periodica do historico BM200
Expose generated frame images through a: Expose generated frame images through a Raspberry Pi USB gadget mass storage drive. This remains inactive until the USB gadget hardware path is available.
Failed to prepare USB OTG boot mode: Falha ao preparar o modo de boot USB OTG
Failed to refresh USB OTG drive: Falha ao atualizar a unidade USB OTG
Failed to restart Bluetooth service: Falha ao reiniciar o servico Bluetooth
Failed to restart bm-gateway service: Falha ao reiniciar o servico bm-gateway
Failed to restore USB host boot mode: Falha ao restaurar o modo de boot host USB
Frame images are being generated for the: As imagens da moldura estao sendo geradas para a moldura digital.
Generate a compact fleet trend chart usi: Generate a compact fleet trend chart using stored battery history.
Generate one or more overview images siz: Generate one or more overview images sized for the picture frame.
Home Assistant discovery republish faile: Republicacao da discovery do Home Assistant falhou
Home Assistant listens under this prefix: Home Assistant listens under this prefix for MQTT discovery payloads.
Home Assistant publishes its online stat: Home Assistant publishes its online status here so the gateway can align discovery behavior.
Imports dense BM200/BM6 history periodic: Importa periodicamente o historico denso BM200/BM6 e apos longos periodos offline.
JPEG is the safest format for most digit: JPEG is the safest format for most digital picture frames.
Keep detailed raw readings for this many: Keep detailed raw readings for this many days before pruning.
Keeps discovery messages on the broker s: Keeps discovery messages on the broker so Home Assistant can rediscover the gateway after restarts.
Keeps the last known gateway and battery: Keeps the last known gateway and battery state on the broker for new subscribers.
Leave blank if your broker allows anonym: Leave blank if your broker allows anonymous connections.
No BLE advertisement seen during the sca: No BLE advertisement seen during the scan window.
No retained history for this metric: Nenhum historico retido para esta metrica
Pick whether charts should open on Volta: Escolha se os gráficos devem abrir em Tensão, Estado de carga ou Temperatura.
Pick whether the web UI follows the syst: Pick whether the web UI follows the system theme or stays locked to light or dark styling.
Preparing USB OTG frame image export: Preparando a exportacao de imagens da moldura USB OTG
Publishes Home Assistant-compatible MQTT: Publishes Home Assistant-compatible MQTT discovery messages so entities can appear automatically.
Raw rows stay available, but tucked behi: Raw rows stay available, but tucked behind a lower-priority operational panel so chart insight leads the page.
Restore Raspberry Pi USB host boot mode?: Restore Raspberry Pi USB host boot mode? A reboot will be required.
Run a history sync after this many secon: Executa uma sincronizacao do historico apos estes segundos desde a ultima linha arquivada.

Select at least one device to include in: Select at least one device to include in frame Fleet Trend charts.
Select at least one device to include in generated frame images.
Set how often the gateway performs a ful: Set how often the gateway performs a full collection cycle.
Set the TCP port used by the web UI, suc: Set the TCP port used by the web UI, such as 80 or 8080.
Set the display name shown across the ga: Set the display name shown across the gateway UI and status views.
Set the exported frame image height in p: Set the exported frame image height in pixels.
Set the exported frame image width in pi: Set the exported frame image width in pixels.
Set the hostname or IP address of the MQ: Set the hostname or IP address of the MQTT broker.
Settings saved; USB OTG frame image expo: Configuracoes salvas; exportacao de imagens da moldura USB OTG iniciada
Shut down the Raspberry Pi now? Wait for: Shut down the Raspberry Pi now? Wait for the activity LED to stop blinking before unplugging power.
Simulate the picture frame output from h: Simulate the picture frame output from hidden USB OTG render pages.
Stable gateway identity. Renaming it als: Stable gateway identity. Renaming it also renames stored history; choose a unique ID that is not already used by another device or old history.
Status range: Charging. The monitor sees: Faixa de estado: Carregando. O monitor detecta a bateria em carga ativa.
Status range: Critical. Battery is in a: Faixa de estado: Critico. A bateria esta em condicao critica ou de alarme.
Status range: Floating. Battery is full: Faixa de estado: Flutuacao. A bateria esta cheia e mantida em carga de flutuacao.
Status range: Low. Battery charge is low: Faixa de estado: Baixo. A carga da bateria esta baixa e deve ser recarregada em breve.
Status range: Normal. Battery condition: Faixa de estado: Normal. A condicao da bateria esta estavel e pronta para uso normal.
The monitor sees the battery under activ: O monitor detecta a bateria em carga ativa.
The reboot command was accepted by the g: The reboot command was accepted by the gateway.
The shutdown command was accepted by the: The shutdown command was accepted by the gateway.
The web interface will stop responding o: The web interface will stop responding once the host powers off. Start it again by reconnecting power.
This becomes the stable device identifie: This becomes the stable device identifier Home Assistant uses for the gateway device.
This is the root topic under which gatew: This is the root topic under which gateway and device state messages are published.
This mirrors the official-app custom bat: This mirrors the official-app custom battery flow. Edit the per-10% thresholds if you want a manual SoC curve instead of the intelligent algorithm.
This page keeps checking the web interfa: This page keeps checking the web interface and redirects when the gateway is online again.
This page updates automatically and retu: Esta pagina atualiza automaticamente e retorna as configuracoes quando a exportacao termina.

Turn this on to publish gateway and devi: Turn this on to publish gateway and device updates to an MQTT broker.

Used only when a username is provided. L: Used only when a username is provided. Leave blank for anonymous brokers.
